cot_prefix: Okay, let's read the passage carefully to find out what Oleksander's wife's attitude was towards his stay with a lion in a cage. The passage says, "Oleksander's wife, Olena, was also very trusting. 'When he first told me about the plan I was very scared. But I decided to support my husband.'" This quote shows that while she was initially scared, she chose to support her husband. So her attitude was supportive. Looking at the choices: (A) indifferent - means she didn't care. But the passage shows she was scared but supported him, so this is not correct. (B) objective - means she was neutral or unbiased. But she did support him, so this is not the best choice. (C) opposed - means she was against it. But she did support him, so this
